query:
SELECT id, username, name, role
FROM users
WHERE name LIKE '%佳穎%' OR username LIKE '%jiaying%' OR username LIKE '%jiaying%';

SELECT edp.userId,
       DATE_FORMAT(edp.businessDate, '%Y-%m-%d') AS business_date,
       edp.totalPoints,
       edp.rawAchievementRate,
       edp.kpiAchievementRate,
       edp.finalKpiScore,
       edp.attendanceFlag
FROM engineer_daily_productivity edp
JOIN users u ON u.id = edp.userId
WHERE (u.name LIKE '%佳穎%' OR u.username LIKE '%jiaying%' OR u.username LIKE '%jiaying%')
  AND edp.businessDate >= DATE_FORMAT(UTC_DATE(), '%Y-%m-01')
ORDER BY edp.businessDate DESC;

SELECT psd.userId,
       DATE_FORMAT(psd.businessDate, '%Y-%m-%d') AS business_date,
       psd.stationCode,
       COUNT(*) AS row_count,
       SUM(psd.completedQty) AS completed_qty,
       SUM(psd.earnedPoints) AS earned_points
FROM productivity_score_details psd
JOIN users u ON u.id = psd.userId
WHERE (u.name LIKE '%佳穎%' OR u.username LIKE '%jiaying%' OR u.username LIKE '%jiaying%')
  AND psd.businessDate >= DATE_FORMAT(UTC_DATE(), '%Y-%m-01')
GROUP BY psd.userId, DATE_FORMAT(psd.businessDate, '%Y-%m-%d'), psd.stationCode
ORDER BY business_date DESC, psd.stationCode;

SELECT stc.userId,
       DATE_FORMAT(stc.businessDate, '%Y-%m-%d') AS business_date,
       SUM(stc.supportHours) AS support_hours
FROM support_task_compensations stc
JOIN users u ON u.id = stc.userId
WHERE (u.name LIKE '%佳穎%' OR u.username LIKE '%jiaying%' OR u.username LIKE '%jiaying%')
  AND stc.businessDate >= DATE_FORMAT(UTC_DATE(), '%Y-%m-01')
GROUP BY stc.userId, DATE_FORMAT(stc.businessDate, '%Y-%m-%d')
ORDER BY business_date DESC;

FROM engineer_daily_productivity edp

WHERE (u.name LIKE '%佳穎%' OR u.username LIKE '%jiaying%' OR u.username LIKE '%jiaying%')
  AND edp.businessDate >= DATE_FORMAT(UTC_DATE(), '%Y-%m-01')

SELECT psd.userId,
       DATE_FORMAT(psd.businessDate, '%Y-%m-%d') AS business_date,
       psd.stationCode,
       COUNT(*) AS row_count,
       SUM(psd.completedQty) AS completed_qty,
       SUM(psd.earnedPoints) AS earned_points
FROM productivity_score_details psd
JOIN users u ON u.id = psd.userId
WHERE (u.name LIKE '%佳穎%' OR u.username LIKE '%jiaying%' OR u.username LIKE '%jiaying%')
  AND psd.businessDate >= DATE_FORMAT(UTC_DATE(), '%Y-%m-01')
GROUP BY psd.userId, DATE_FORMAT(psd.businessDate, '%Y-%m-%d'), psd.stationCode
ORDER BY business_date DESC, psd.stationCode;

SELECT stc.userId,
       DATE_FORMAT(stc.businessDate, '%Y-%m-%d') AS business_date,
       SUM(stc.supportHours) AS support_hours
FROM support_task_compensations stc
JOIN users u ON u.id = stc.userId
WHERE (u.name LIKE '%佳穎%' OR u.username LIKE '%jiaying%' OR u.username LIKE '%jiaying%')
  AND stc.businessDate >= DATE_FORMAT(UTC_DATE(), '%Y-%m-01')
GROUP BY stc.userId, DATE_FORMAT(stc.businessDate, '%Y-%m-%d')
ORDER BY business_date DESC;
